programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Missionary Man
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: Missionary Man
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Jagged Edge (1985)
programme.desc: A defense attorney (Glenn Close) falls for her client, a rich, handsome publisher (Jeff Bridges) who may or may not be what the prosecution claims he is: a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A paralyzed forensics expert and a young policewoman must work together to stop a brutal serial killer.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger is movie idol Jack Slater in Last Action Hero, which follows the adventures of 11-year-old Danny (Austin O'Brien), whose magic ticket blasts him out of his theater seat and into an action movie. There he teams up with Slater, living his wildest fantasies in a celluloid world where anything is possible.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four friends made a pact to conceal a shocking secret. But now, someone has learned the truth.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick reluctantly takes on the D.A. who prosecuted him when Barbara's son is arrested for possession.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick represents an Arab American who is being sued for defending his restaurant against a vandal's attack, Burton must face a flurry of possible defections from the firm, including his own son.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As Nick tries to reunite a twelve-year-old boy with a schizophrenic dad who murdered his wife, Alvin represents his ex-wife in a lawsuit being argued by Burton.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick tries to get a gay teen adopted by a gay couple; Amanda takes the lead in defending a philandering executive against a sexual harassment lawsuit.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick fights to have a disabled boy placed with his ex-con stepfather; the Fallins are drawn into a proxy fight that could tear apart a family they have long represented.

programme.title: The Guardian

programme.title: The Guardian

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Travelling to Malta in search of answers about his past, Alex and his best friends Tom and Kyra uncover the beginnings of a deadly plot and the identity of Scorpia's charismatic new leader.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As the Department receive a horrifying threat against the United Kingdom, Alex follows the trail of a shady scientist working for Scorpia to a secret laboratory aboard a decommissioned ship.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex has been captured and Tom, Kyra and Jack must scramble to find him. As Scorpia demonstrate the power of their new weapon, Invisible Sword, Alex is confronted by Julia Rothman with some uncomfortable truths about his father.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Cut off from his friends and forced to work with one of his greatest foes, Alex endures a punishing induction to Scorpia, and must face off against a gang of ruthless trainee assassins.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To prove his loyalty Alex is sent on a mission for Scorpia, with Tom and Kyra following close behind hoping to rescue him. Meanwhile the Department attempt to unlock the secret of Invisible Sword.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex returns home with a dark mission of revenge. Jack, Tom and Kyra must enlist the help of unlikely allies to save Alex before he commits to Scorpia forever.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Captured and questioned by the Department, Alex must rely on his friends to remind him who he truly is. But are there still truths about his past the Department haven't told him?

programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: The Laramie Project
programme.desc: "The Laramie Project" is set in and around Laramie, Wyoming, in the aftermath of the murder of 21-year-old Matthew Shepard. To create the stage version of "The Laramie Project," the eight-member New York-based Tectonic Theatre Project traveled to Laramie, Wyoming, recording hours of interviews with the town's citizens over a two-year period. The film adaptation dramatizes the troupe's visit, using the actual words from the transcripts to create a portrait of a town forced to confront itself.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A heated debate amongst beachgoers and private homeowners emerges on the Santa Rosa Beach shoreline in Florida; in rural Montana, Seth takes issue with a gate placed by new neighbor Josh, who insists he's within his legal rights to do so.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: In Indiana, Darrell's retirement bliss is thrown into disarray when Trever starts raising livestock on his grandmother's property; in Philadelphia, Jean's penchant for taking in dozens of stray cats encroaches on Marcie's family life.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: In Florida, former friends Melissa and Victoria dispute the rightful ownership of a small patch of grass between their West Palm Beach homes; in Palm Bay, Johnny and Andy's own grass-related feud leads to accusations of stalking.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: About Face: Supermodels Then and Now
programme.desc: Carmen Dell'Orefice, Carol Alt, Isabella Rossellini, Christie Brinkley, Beverly Johnson and other models discuss their groundbreaking careers.

programme.title: Donyale Luna: Supermodel
programme.desc: The life and career of Donyale Luna, who was one of the first Black models to appear on the cover of Vogue.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Any One of Us
programme.desc: An unprecedented glimpse into the world of spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: I Can Be President: A Kid's-Eye View
programme.desc: Children's ideas about the presidency.

programme.title: Miss You Can Do It
programme.desc: Abbey Curran, the first woman with cerebral palsy to compete in a Miss USA Pageant, creates a pageant specifically for girls with special needs.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. Bob joins Teddy in trying to catch home run balls on his boat floating outside Wonder Wharf Stadium while Linda is left alone to manage the restaurant - elsewhere, Tina and Zeke go to watch when Jimmy Jr takes modern dance lessons at the recreation centre with an overbearing dance instructor.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. Linda books the Belchers for a summer holiday in a lakeside cabin hoping to get them to forge some lasting family memories, but it's an immediate disaster as the lake is tainted with parasites, there are gigantic swarms of biting bugs about, it's swelteringly hot and there is no water or toilets. When Bob and the kids avoid cabin fever by secretly watching a portable TV, Linda finds out about it and storms out of the cabin into great peril...

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Jason's brother Darius is getting married and Marcus desperately wants to hire out the Crown and Toga for the occasion - while Grumio offers his services as a wedding planner, the duo's plans are threatened when they find out that Darius is a serial jilter. Elsewhere, Marcus clashes with a lazy postman.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Downtown dog lovers Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but they have tenants in their basement and no creative space inside - Brian and Sarah therefore turn their uninspired backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for a cool industrial feel.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Brian, Elmo and Michael compete for the affections of Lauren from Milton Keynes. Which of the three single shoppers' fashion choices will win them a date?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. Billie and Greg attempt to restore some order with the introduction of chores that see the kids learning about the value of money, but not everyone is on board with the idea - meanwhile, Greg and Paul join Billie and Sam on their podcast and reveal some shocking secrets and parenting clashes, Nelly's continued interest in make-up causes Billie to decide to take her shopping, and Greg throws an extravagant cowboy-themed party where a cheeky prank leaves him hot under the collar.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Bobby and Matt are going from strength to strength; they've moved in together and are more loved up than ever before. But Bobby's biological clock is ticking, and he's feeling broody.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The ladies reunite in New York to discuss the fourth series' highs and lows as new housewife Monica sets the record straight about her past - from her affair and her history with the Mormon church to how she became an informant in her ex-friend's criminal case - and Angie confronts Monica and Meredith about the rumours regarding her husband and the Greek Mafia.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: The Tipping Point: Reality show. The ladies enjoy their final days in Mexico as Jennifer questions all of her relationships and seeks the help of a shaman. [S] S17 Ep15

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. Dawn Ward is back again, and this time she joins Rachel to jump headfirst out of a plane - unfortunately, it's a bumpy ride for Rachel in more ways than one while an orchestrated lunch fails to resolve growing tensions between Paige and herself. When then at Sheena's perfume launch, Lystra finally airs a long-standing grudge that shocks Rachel - and leaves Lystra furious.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Phil Daniels, Steph McGovern, and AJ Odudu all trying to guess well-known phrases from animated clues - if they can 'say what they see', they could get the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the dramatic and fast-paced game show. The trivia battle turns up the heat as only 42 players remain.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims have had more awkward chats than they've had hot dinners, but they are still no closer to getting their friendship back on track - the former self-proclaimed soulmates have reached a stalemate and it's time for a third-party intervention. Pete has enlisted a therapist to help the pair navigate their issues - when all three sit down for a serious heart-to-heart, will bridges be built and will Pete and Chloe acknowledge that their feelings for one another may run deeper than they've been letting on when some shocking secrets come to light? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have been unshakeable recently, but a spanner's been thrown in the works - it turns out that Dan confided in Demi that their relationship wasn't all rosy during lockdown... and the information is winging its way back to Amber fast. How will she react when she finds out her significant other has been voicing concerns about their relationship to none other than a Sims, and will she be able to move on?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. When a heatwave hits Quahog, Peter gets Brian to enter a dog show to win 500 dollars so that the family can get a new air conditioner. When they argue over a trick that goes wrong, Brian walks out on the family and Peter replaces him with a cat. Brian struggles to assert his civil rights and soon ends up at the pound.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Back at home, Roger builds a vineyard and starts up a private sweatshop of foster children.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Because of a past incident at his own prom, where he was lured into a dance with the homecoming queen only to have a pile of pigs dropped on him, Stan wants revenge by showing off that he married a homecoming queen, Francine. A proud Stan accompanies Francine to her reunion, but when they find out that two ballots were lost and that Francine didn't actually win the crown, Stan is devastated.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Reece's driving lesson with Disneyland Darren quickly descends into chaos, but beneath the madness Darren reveals a surprising need to be a father figure. At school, Mia-Louise lands a football academy place but clashes with disciplined teammate Daisy, whose professionalism exposes Mia-Louise's attitude problems. Aimee attends a high-stakes audition for a Cilla Black musical with Mr Dunn, but class prejudice makes her question whether she belongs. When Darren arranges a secret hookup at the same hotel, Reece and Christopher mistakenly believe Dunn is cheating on Jodie. Their attempt to expose him spirals into farce, sending an angry husband to the wrong room and triggering absurd misunderstandings. Amid the chaos, Aimee finds her voice in the audition while Mia- Louise's prank video goes viral, threatening her football future.

programme.title: Inspector Morse: The Wench is Dead
programme.desc: Detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. Morse investigates a murder that takes him away from the familiar setting of 20th-century Oxford to solving a canal murder in Oxford in 1859 - he becomes convinced that the boatmen publicly hanged for the murder were victims of a gross miscarriage of justice and, nearly 140 years after their deaths on the gallows, sets out to establish the true facts of the case.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in a Yorkshire village. An eccentric old woman reports an abduction, and Greengrass meets an old friend with an unusual proposition.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Debbie Moffett worked at the dairy, founded by her colleague Jim Caxton, who seems more anxious about his precious cheese than Debbie's death. Later, Debbie's lover Oliver Ordish is garrotted with cheese wire and covered with cheese fly larvae. Jones then discovers that dairy owner Gregory Brantner was paying the dead man a consultancy fee. That night Gregory goes to investigate an alarm at the dairy and is stabbed through the heart with a cheese needle. Can Barnaby and Jones stop the killer before the bitterness of the past leads to yet more agonising deaths?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lily protests her innocence when Shane questions her about the raffle prize but Edna sees straight through her. Shane gives Jasmine a false tip-off about a drugs raid.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Peter shrugs off Edna's pleas to return the car, leaving her to consider making a huge sacrifice. Jo is involved in a dispute with a farmhand, and Gennie warns Brenda off Bob.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Excited about attending the fashion awards, Rosie lords it over Kevin, only to discover Carla is now going instead. Meanwhile, Liz and Clarissa decide it's payback time for Harry.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. Gina finds herself accused of taking drugs as she attempts to rekindle her singing career. Following a windfall, David makes a foolish investment.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. A new restaurant run by two brothers is the target of sabotage and an old friend of Gina's comes to stay in Aidensfield. Greengrass thinks he has unearthed his fortune after he develops an interest in archaeology.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on the novel of the same name by Ann Cleeves. Vera and the team investigate the case of a murdered social worker called Jenny Lister, a woman who was universally considered to have been principled and popular - in an overworked and understaffed social work system, a notorious case involving the death of a child seems to hold the key to solving the killing. Vera uses her innate empathy and intuition to pursue the truth behind the murder - when she discovers the real secret at the heart of Jenny's death, the killer will stop at nothing to keep it hidden.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks agrees to help his old friend and partner DS Jimmy Valentine in an undercover drug sting. But a gun is pulled and someone ends up dead. What appears to be a tragic mistake is investigated by internal affairs and DS Matt Devlin who fears Jimmy is not all he seems. As they push for the truth the spotlight turns on Ronnie and, in particular, his dark past as a functioning alcoholic when a ten year old drug case was left with no witnesses and a large quantity of missing heroin. The evidence is stacking up against the police and James Steel and Alesha Phillips of the CPS battle Valentine's barrister, Evelyn Wyndham, to bring enough evidence to court. The jigsaw piece that will win it for them is Ronnie. But he refuses to testify. Is there something suspect in Ronnie's past that will end his career now? Can the CPS find any other way of proving their case or in court will it be Valentine's Day?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The drama based on the hit US show, which opens with a hard-hitting, emotional and thought-provoking episode dealing with the moral complexities of policing the crimes of minors and putting children on trial. When a young child is murdered, the terrifying CCTV footage of the boy being led to his death haunts both the police officers and legal team involved in the case. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find their investigation is made more shocking because the two suspects in the frame are children themselves - and each child blames the other. Can forensic evidence determine which youngster is responsible for the strangling of little Conor? Prosecutor George Castle defies his superiors and takes instruction from Conor's mother, who proves to have a surprising point of view on the crime. But can the justice system - and ultimately the government - afford to be lenient?

programme.title: Shetland

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.desc: The last-ever episode of the detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. Morse returns to full duties as the year-long investigation into the murder of Yvonne Harrison in a quiet Cotswold village is revitalised with the promise of new evidence... but what exactly is the state of Morse's health, and how will he react to Lewis leading the investigation?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. Gina finds herself accused of taking drugs as she attempts to rekindle her singing career. Following a windfall, David makes a foolish investment.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson investigate a series of murders in Midsomer St Claire that seem to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt - as the village prepares for storms and flooding, it appears that someone is using ancient torture methods to punish modern-day sinners. Who is responsible and what motive do they have?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in a rural northern village. A snobbish couple recently returned from Africa find it hard to settle in the village, while their son appears to be the victim of bullying. Greengrass is furious when David bids for some pigs at auction by mistake.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in a rural northern village. Mike and Jackie's future looks uncertain when Jackie's uncle becomes a suspect in a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. When a local property developer is diagnosed with a malignant brain tumour, a few people in the picturesque village of Badger's Drift suspect that he will soon be violently murdered - it is down to DCI Barnaby and DS Troy to unearth the reasoning behind this seemingly tragic crime. Was it motivated by suppressed ill feeling within the village, or could it stem from long-buried secrets deeply rooted in the past?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in her home, the police cannot be sure a crime was even committed. With no forensic evidence and nothing to suggest the victim did not die of natural causes, officers Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin question why they were even called out. But the girl's mother is convinced that her daughter was raped, and further investigation uncovers a murder weapon and a possible suspect. Senior crown prosecutor James Steel remembers this particular suspect well - and he is positive the man is guilty. Steel pursues him with every power available to him, pushing the law to its limit. His colleagues are unsure whether his fervour is justified, and they worry that he is hounding someone who has served his time in prison and paid his debt to society. Is Steel's instinct correct or is he persecuting an innocent man?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When three people are violently murdered and a fourth left for dead in a central London shop, DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin are up against the clock as they try to find the culprit, who they fear could strike again at any time. Their search is helped by information about the unusual murder weapon - a bayonet. When the investigation comes to court, senior crown prosecutor James Steel thinks he has a fairly open and shut case. But things take an unexpected turn when he discovers that the defendant has acquired some brilliant legal support. With the case for the defence looking stronger and stronger, Steel's only hope seems to be getting the accused man to accept responsibility for his actions - but his job is made tougher because the man is delusional. Then Steel is thrown for another loop when he realises he is facing a barrister he had not bargained for on the opposing bench.

programme.title: Shetland

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Blue Lightning - Part Two: The conclusion of this case of the murder mystery series. Time is running out for DI Perez as prime suspect Peter Latimer lies critically ill in hospital. [S] S2 Ep6

programme.desc: Tony keeps his cool when quizzed by the police about Rosie's disappearance and Kevin has to answer a few uncomfortable questions about his daughter's relationship with John.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A flu epidemic causes havoc in Aidensfield, and Maggie is forced to make some tough decisions when baby Sam is put at risk. Greengrass plays a dangerous game when he poses as a fence.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the murder of 29-year-old Niall Coulter - with those closest to Niall intent upon obscuring the truth, it is not until the body of a drug dealer is found washed up on a Northumberland beach that the dreadful truth begins to emerge about Niall's past. While coping with revelations from her own past, Vera sifts through evidence of the grief, love and addiction that characterised Niall's life and deduces that his murderer acted through selfless and unrequited love.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A case hits close to home for DS Matt Devlin when he investigates the death of a police officer. The dead man was his best friend Sergeant Pete Garvey - whom he had known since they were boys. When Matt discovers that Pete had recently been in contact with their childhood parish priest Jonathan Nugent, he is suspicious because Pete claimed to have been sexually abused by Nugent as a boy. But with nothing but unfounded rumours to go on, a murder charge cannot be brought against the priest. Now married with a family of his own, can Matt really be sure they are after the right man? James and Alesha take an unusual approach in a desperate attempt to get the case solved.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When prison warder Charlie Tyner is found shot dead on a council estate in Hackney, it soon comes to light that, rather than having been the honest officer he appeared to be, he was corrupt and had taken advantage of his position in a number of ways. Plenty of prisoners inside had good reason for wanting him dead but, being locked up, they all have solid alibis. Crown prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips find themselves at odds with their boss, George Castle, who is keen to bring the killer to justice. James and Alesha cannot help feeling that Tyner's past behaviour should be brought into consideration when charging the accused. And the pair have their eye on a much greater prize - a career criminal connected to Tyner who has evaded the justice system for too long. Can James and Alesha convince their key witness to give evidence against a man she claims to love?

programme.desc: Astonishing and seemingly-impossible scenes filmed by members of the public and narrated by award-winning actor Roger Allam - the people who recorded these stories and are sharing their memories of these once-in-a-lifetime experiences this time include a kayaker who found himself trapped behind a waterfall in Mexico, a barber who pulled a driver from a burning car in Las Vegas, a family who narrowly escaped a doomed ship in Greece, a student pilot who was forced to land her plane in Michigan without a front wheel, and world champion cyclist Gee Atherton recalling a fall from a mountain in Wales that nearly cost him his life.
