programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A motorcycle gang seeks to avenge a drug-dealing comrade's death by killing his customers. Written by John Milius.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: An actor/writer steals a drug dealer's wallet containing vital information; guest Benicio Del Toro.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: An East German spy (Jeroen Krabbé) seeks revenge for the 26-year-old murder of Gina's Cuban mother; guest Shawn Elliott.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: By scaring the jury into a mistrial, a mobster hopes to buy time to find the witness Crockett is protecting.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: The fury of feuding TV evangelists hits Tubbs when he is accused of raping a parishioner; guests Brian Dennehy, Anita Morris.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: An actress's on-screen murder propels Tubbs and Crockett to investigate the film's flaky director (Paul Guilfoyle).

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Tubbs and Crockett mediate between two parties who want to acquire the cryogenically preserved body of a reggae singer.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A rancher (Stuart Whitman) tries to ruin a Vietnam veteran's (Robert Sampson) struggling farm; guest Tim Rossovich.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate exploits death threats, fabricated for publicity, to kill his manager.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A motivational researcher blackmails to further his career, kills a man, then frames the victim's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An enraged publisher hires a gunman to kill an author who intends to sign a contract with a competitor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prodigy and his robot help investigate the murder of a professor who threatened to disgrace a colleague's scientist son.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A gospel singer kills his evangelist wife when she denies him more money and threatens blackmail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and has a friend cover up the act with a burglary, only to have the friend blackmail him into doing the same favor in return.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo keeps a close watch on a physical-fitness fanatic suspected of murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prominent photographer hatches a scheme to cover up his wife's murder with a phony kidnapping plot.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A military-academy commandant murders to protect his career and prevent his school's conversion to a coed junior college.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo's Mexico cruise is disrupted when an automobile executive kills his blackmailing lover, the ship's singer, then frames a musician.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (George Hamilton) romances a wealthy patient (Lesley Ann Warren) then uses her in his alibi after killing her husband (Stephen Elliott).

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired actress/dancer stages her wealthy husband's suicide after he refuses to finance her Broadway comeback.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer, a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew, whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A guardian (David Knight) and his lover (Moira Redmond) stage grim scenes to drive a haunted English heiress (Jennie Linden) mad.

programme.title: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: An office worker becomes trapped in a building with a killer.

programme.title: Phantasm II
programme.desc: Two psychically linked teens (James LeGros, Paula Irvine) cannot escape from the grave-robbing Tall Man of their nightmares.","large":"Years after surviving his encounter with the sinister Tall Man (Angus Scrimm), Mike Pearson (James LeGros), now a mental patient, still has nightmares about the evil gaunt mortician. Upon being released from the institution, Mike and his friend Reggie (Reggie Bannister) set out to track down the Tall Man and end his murderous and macabre practices. Also involved is Liz Reynolds (Paula Irvine), a pretty young woman who has a psychic connection to both Mike and the Tall Man.

programme.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
programme.desc: Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) phones a talk show and recalls his life as a 1940s teenager (Henry Thomas) warped by his mother (Olivia Hussey).","large":"Released from a mental institution once again, Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) calls in to tell his life story to a radio host (CCH Pounder). Norman recalls his days as a young boy living with his schizophrenic mother (Olivia Hussey), and the jealous rage that inspired her murder. In the present, Norman lives with his pregnant wife, Connie (Donna Mitchell), fearing that his child will inherit his split personality disorder, and "Mother" will return to kill again.

programme.title: Rosewood Lane
programme.desc: Sonny Blake (Rose McGowan), a radio talk show therapist, moves back to her childhood home after her father dies. She is shocked to learn her neighbors are terrified of the paperboy (Daniel Ross Owens) who turns out to be a dangerous sociopath.

programme.title: Saint Ange
programme.desc: Strange events haunt a pregnant woman (Virginie Ledoyen) and others at a recently vacated orphanage in the French Alps.","large":"Anna is a cleaning woman who accepts a post at the St. Ange Orphanage. She arrives to confront an unsettling lack of orphans, save for one who acts far too childish for her age. Then the bizarre sights and sounds begin, which seem to elude detection by the only other servant or the gloomy institution's director. Is this all in Anna's mind? Or does something more sinister lurk in the heart of St. Ange?

programme.title: Session 9
programme.desc: Asbestos removal crews start work in an abandoned insane asylum, and strange happenings begin to occur.","large":"A tale of terror when a group of asbestos removal workers start work in an abandoned insane asylum. The complex of buildings looms up out of the woods like a dormant beast. Grand, imposing ... abandoned, deteriorating. The residents of Danvers, Massachusetts steer well clear of the place. But Danvers State Mental Hospital, closed down for 15 years, is about to receive five new visitors...

programme.title: SiREN
programme.desc: A man visits a supernatural nightclub during his bachelor party and inadvertently crosses paths with a dancer who is actually a terrifying, legendary creature.","large":"One week before his wedding day, Jonah and his groomsmen hit the town for a wild night of club hopping and debauchery. The night soon takes a twisted turn for the worse when the group is invited to a seedy underground club. After Jonah frees a seemingly imprisoned dancer, he realizes that the woman he released is actually a terrifying, legendary creature that will stop at nothing to claim her prey.

programme.title: The Skulls
programme.desc: A freshman (Joshua Jackson) joins an elite society that will guarantee him success, but he questions his decision when his reporter roommate dies mysteriously.","large":"For Luke McNamara (Joshua Jackson), an invitation to join the prestigious secret college organization, The Skulls, is a dream come true. But he soon comes to realize just how powerful The Skulls organization really is -- and that the truth, like success, comes at a very high price.

programme.title: The Skulls II
programme.desc: A new inductee (Robin Dunne) into the secret society witnesses a murder at the hands of one of its members.","large":"The Skulls, a secret college society whose influence reaches the highest levels of government and business, recruit Ryan Sommers (Robin Dunne), whose future success now seems all but assured. Then one day he sees one of his fraternity brothers kill a young woman -- a crime that Ryan must keep secret if he is to remain a Skull. While Kelly (Lindy Booth), a good friend, pushes him to follow his conscience, Ryan's girlfriend, Ali (Ashley Lyn Cafagna), surprises him by being against his snitching.

programme.title: The Skulls III
programme.desc: A young woman (Clare Kramer) gets more than she bargained for when she gains entrance to a males-only secret society.","large":"In this sequel, beautiful and determined college student Taylor Brooks (Clare Kramer) is intent on joining the secret society known as the Skulls, despite its history of being an organization consisting solely of men. Although she encounters strong resistance, Taylor takes steps toward being accepted into their ranks, but her efforts are derailed when her boyfriend is found dead. Taylor is considered the prime suspect. Can she clear her name and track down the real murderer?

programme.title: The Spider Woman Strikes Back
programme.desc: She (Gale Sondergaard) and her hulking servant grow bloodsucking plants, as a young woman (Brenda Joyce) finds out.

programme.title: Stephanie
programme.desc: After a mysterious global catastrophe, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home.","large":"A young girl is left alone in her house during a worldwide catastrophe and fearfully hides from a malevolent force that is stalking her. When her parents miraculously return, they try to settle back into normal life, but become increasingly concerned about something that has affected their daughter Stephanie.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: Passengers (Jamie Lee Curtis, William Baldwin, Donald Sutherland) on a sinking ship board a seemingly deserted Russian vessel containing a mutating alien force.","large":"Caught in a typhoon, a tugboat commanded by Robert Everton (Donald Sutherland) comes across a mysterious near-deserted ship. Excited to find a vessel that could be sold for as much as $30 million, Everton and his crew board and prepare to move the craft, despite the warnings of sole survivor Nadia Vinogradova (Joanna Pacula). When a malevolent alien presence begins killing off the crew, navigator Kit Foster (Jamie Lee Curtis) tries to convince the rest of them to leave before it's too late.

programme.title: Visions
programme.desc: After moving to a vineyard with her family, a pregnant woman experiences horrifying visions.

programme.title: Wer
programme.desc: In France, an American female attorney (A.J. Cook) defends a murder suspect who has a brutish appearance and a deadly secret.

programme.title: White Noise 2: The Light
programme.desc: After nearly being killed along with his family, a man recovers and realizes that he can sense when someone is about to die.","large":"A man's family is killed, but he survives -- barely. After recovering, he realizes that he has changed in some way: He now senses when someone is about to die. In his attempts to save people who are near death, he discovers there is a price to pay for interfering with the cosmos.

programme.title: The Wilding
programme.desc: A family tries to start over following a daughter's release from a mental health institution.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Hyde
programme.desc: Policemen Slim (Bud Abbott) and Tubby (Lou Costello) go to London and meet a doctor (Boris Karloff) and his evil alter ego.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein
programme.desc: Dracula (Bela Lugosi) wants to put porter's (Lou Costello) brain in monster's body.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man
programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Killer, Boris Karloff
programme.desc: A hotel detective (Bud Abbott) and bellhop (Lou Costello) find dead bodies and a fake swami (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
programme.desc: Two guys stuck in Egypt follow a medallion to the crypt of Kharis.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: Scientists (Arthur Hill, David Wayne, James Olson) rush to isolate an alien germ brought back by a space probe.","large":"Chilling tale about a US research satellite carrying a deadly extraterrestrial microscopic organism that crashes into a small town in Arizona. A group of top scientists are hurriedly assembled in a bid to identify and contain the lethal stowaway. Based on the novel by Michael Crichton.

programme.title: The Black Cat
programme.desc: Stranded Budapest honeymooners follow a mad doctor (Bela Lugosi) to a black-lipped architect's (Boris Karloff) Art Deco manor.

programme.title: The Boy Who Cried Werewolf
programme.desc: A boy (Scott Sealey) upset by his parents' divorce must also tell the sheriff his father (Kerwin Mathews) is a werewolf.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).","large":"After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Brides of Dracula
programme.desc: Van Helsing (Peter Cushing) drives a stake through the heart of a vampire baron (David Peel) who even bites his own mother (Martita Hunt).

programme.title: The Car
programme.desc: A Western deputy sheriff (James Brolin) chases a driverless black car that keeps running people down.","large":"Two bicyclists are run down by a strange black car in the desert near a small town in Utah. But this is just the first in a series of hit-and-run murders. Sheriff Wade Parents (James Brolin) is called in to investigate, and his deputy, Everett (John Marley), is killed by the black sedan, which, some witnesses say, has no one behind its wheel. When the car threatens a local school parade, the lives of the town's children and Wade's teacher girlfriend, Lauren (Kathleen Lloyd), are endangered.

programme.title: Child's Play 2
programme.desc: While Andy's mother is admitted to a psychiatric hospital, the young boy is placed in foster care, and Chucky, determined to claim Andy's soul, is not far behind.","large":"Two years after serial killer Charles Lee Ray (Brad Dourif) inserted his soul into a Chucky doll, a toy company attempts to re-create the doll, bringing Ray back in the process. The possessed doll, intent on claiming a human body, kills his way toward former owner Andy (Alex Vincent), who now lives in a foster home. Andy's foster sister, Kyle (Christine Elise), tries to protect him, but his foster parents believe Andy is just a troubled kid -- and Chucky's murderous path continues.

programme.title: Child's Play 3
programme.desc: Chucky returns for revenge against Andy, the young boy who defeated him, and now a teenager living in a military academy.","large":"It's been years since Chucky, the doll with the soul and the voice (Brad Dourif) of a psychopathic killer, was apparently destroyed in a fire at a doll factory. Now Chucky's manufacturer is remaking the same line of toys with the old, still haunted materials. This resurrects Chucky, who goes after Andy (Justin Whalin), his former owner, who now attends military school. Chucky slashes his way through a string of grotesque murders as Andy tries to stop the homicidal doll and the spirit within it.

programme.title: Curse of Chucky
programme.desc: Out for revenge, Chucky (Brad Dourif) the killer doll infiltrates the family of a woman, her sister and her young niece.

programme.title: Cult of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky returns to terrorize his human victim, Nica, who is confined to an asylum for the criminally insane. Meanwhile, the killer doll has some scores to settle with his old enemies, with the help of his former wife.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: Two people (Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin) discover that a TV commercial will cue a madman's (Dan O'Herlihy) Halloween masks to explode.","large":"Hospital emergency room Dr. Daniel "Dan" Challis (Tom Atkins) and Ellie Grimbridge (Stacey Nelkin), the daughter of a murder victim, uncover a terrible plot by small-town mask maker Conal Cochran (Dan O'Herlihy), a madman who's planning a Halloween mass murder utilizing an ancient Celtic ritual. The ritual involves a boulder stolen from Stonehenge, the use of Silver Shamrock masks and a triggering device contained in a television commercial -- all designed to kill millions of children.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: A pistol-packing woman (Charlize Theron) helps a cowardly farmer (Seth MacFarlane) find his inner courage, but when her outlaw husband (Liam Neeson) rides into town seeking revenge, the farmer must put his newfound bravery to the test.","large":"Mild-mannered sheep farmer Albert Stark (Seth MacFarlane) feels certain that the Western frontier is trying to kill him, then he loses his girlfriend, Louise (Amanda Seyfried), to the town's most successful businessman. However, a beautiful, pistol-packing woman named Anna (Charlize Theron) rides into town and helps Albert find his inner courage. Then Stark must put his newfound bravery to the test when Anna's outlaw husband arrives with plans to plant him in an unmarked grave.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A British constable (Simon Pegg) feels certain foul play is afoot when a series of grisly accidents rocks his quiet village.","large":"As a former London constable, Nicholas Angel (Simon Pegg) finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf (Nick Frost) for a partner. However, when a series of grisly accidents rocks Sandford, Nick smells something rotten in the idyllic village.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After her release from prison, a former CEO (Melissa McCarthy) battles old enemies while trying to build a brownie empire with her ex-assistant (Kristen Bell).","large":"Wealthy CEO Michelle Darnell (Melissa McCarthy) always gets her way, until she's busted for insider trading and sent to federal prison. After leaving jail, Darnell finds herself broke, homeless and hated. Luckily, she tracks down former assistant Claire (Kristen Bell), the only person who's willing to help. While staying with Claire and her young daughter, the ex-con devises a new business model for a brownie empire. Unfortunately, some old enemies stand in the way of her return to the top.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman (Amy Poehler) and her hotheaded sister (Tina Fey) throw a party that spirals out of control at their childhood home.","large":"When their parents decide to sell their home, siblings Maura (Amy Poehler) and Kate (Tina Fey) learn that they have one weekend to clean out the junk from their old bedroom. Unhappy with the news, the recently divorced Maura and her hotheaded sister make plans to throw one final bash to recapture their glory days with their former classmates. As the raging party begins to spiral out of control, the gals soon realize that there may not be a house left once the dust settles.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: Amid a series of personal and professional crises, a long-married couple (Paul Rudd, Leslie Mann) must figure out how to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.","large":"After many years of marriage, Pete (Paul Rudd) is the sole male in a household that includes his wife, Debbie (Leslie Mann), and two young daughters (Iris Apatow, Maude Apatow). As Pete struggles to keep his record label afloat, he and Debbie navigate a three-week course of sex and romance, career victories and financial hardships, aging parents and maturing children. They'll have to learn to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

As Pete struggles to keep his record label afloat, he and Debbie navigate a three-week course of sex and romance, career victories and financial hardships, aging parents and maturing children. They'll have to learn to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.

programme.title: Smokin' Aces
programme.desc: Two FBI agents (Ray Liotta, Ryan Reynolds) must protect an entertainer (Jeremy Piven) from a motley crew of assassins after the guy agrees to testify against the Las Vegas mob.","large":"Sleazy entertainer Buddy "Aces" Israel incurs the wrath of crime boss Primo Sparazza when he agrees to testify against the Las Vegas mob. Two FBI agents have the difficult task of protecting him from a motley assortment of bounty hunters, hit men and nefarious vixens who are converging on his Lake Tahoe encampment to rub him out and collect a hefty reward.

programme.title: Backdraft 2
programme.desc: A fire investigator with the Chicago Fire Department tracks an arms dealer who uses deadly fires as a distraction.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: Spies (Julia Roberts, Clive Owen) for rival corporations carry on a clandestine love affair while trying to find the formula for a product that will earn a fortune for the company that patents it first.","large":"Claire Stenwick (Julia Roberts) and Ray Koval (Clive Owen) are former government operatives who are now collecting big paychecks from rival companies as corporate spies. Their latest mission is to grab the formula for a product that will earn a fortune for whichever company patents it first. The stakes grow even higher than expected when Claire and Ray become embroiled in a passionate, clandestine affair, though neither one can decide how far to trust the other.

programme.title: Nocturnal Animals
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.","large":"A successful Los Angeles art-gallery owner's idyllic life is marred by the constant traveling of her handsome second husband. While he is away, she is shaken by the arrival of a manuscript written by her first husband, who she has not seen in years. The manuscript tells the story of a teacher who finds a trip with his family turning into a nightmare. As Susan reads the book, it forces her to examine her past and confront some dark truths.

programme.title: Thoroughbreds
programme.desc: Two upper-class teenage girls in suburban Connecticut rekindle their unlikely friendship after years of growing apart. Together, they hatch a plan to solve both of their problems -- no matter what the cost.","large":"Childhood friends Lily and Amanda reconnect in suburban Connecticut after years of growing apart. Lily has turned into a polished upper-class teenager who has a fancy boarding school on her transcript and a coveted internship on her resume. Amanda has developed a sharp wit and her own particular attitude but all in the process of becoming a social outcast. Though they initially seem completely at odds, the pair eventually bond and hatch a plan to solve both of their problems.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: The average person uses 10 percent of their brain capacity. Imagine what she could do with 100 percent.","large":"When a boyfriend tricks Lucy (Scarlett Johansson) into delivering a briefcase to a supposed business contact, the once-carefree student is abducted by thugs who intend to turn her into a drug mule. She is surgically implanted with a package containing a powerful chemical, but it leaks into her system, giving her superhuman abilities, including telekinesis and telepathy. With her former captors in pursuit, Lucy seeks out a neurologist (Morgan Freeman), who she hopes will be able to help her.

programme.title: Smokin' Aces
programme.desc: Two FBI agents (Ray Liotta, Ryan Reynolds) must protect an entertainer (Jeremy Piven) from a motley crew of assassins after the guy agrees to testify against the Las Vegas mob.","large":"Sleazy entertainer Buddy "Aces" Israel incurs the wrath of crime boss Primo Sparazza when he agrees to testify against the Las Vegas mob. Two FBI agents have the difficult task of protecting him from a motley assortment of bounty hunters, hit men and nefarious vixens who are converging on his Lake Tahoe encampment to rub him out and collect a hefty reward.

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: A husband (Morgan Freeman) and wife (Diane Keaton) spend a hectic weekend pondering the sale of the apartment they've shared for more than 40 years.

programme.title: The Caveman's Valentine
programme.desc: Disturbing images haunt a mentally ill homeless man as he attempts to pin a youth's murder on a celebrated photographer.","large":"Romulus is a homeless man who dwells in a cave in one of New York City's parks, but was once a promising composer. When a boy is discovered dead on Valentine's Day, everyone assumes he froze to death, but Romulus believes he was murdered by noted photographer David Leppenraub. He struggles to convince everyone, including his police officer daughter -- but, inspired by hallucinations of his late wife, he eventually gets his chance to crack the case himself.

programme.title: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: In order to get a breather from their meddling sister-in-law (Gabrielle Union), three men pay a playboy (LL Cool J) $5,000 to romance her.","large":"Eva has been in charge of her younger sisters ever since their parents died, many years ago. Eva's uncanny ability to interfere in her sisters' affairs has not endeared her to their spouses and partners. The men would like to close out and divide up the family trust fund that Eva oversees. So they concoct a simple plan: compensate cash strapped ladies' man Ray Adams (LL Cool J) to romance and distract Eva from her familial duties. Sparks fly between Ray and Eva ... but the plan goes awry.

programme.title: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Long-forgotten rivalries and romances reignite when college friends (Morris Chestnut, Taye Diggs, Regina Hall) have a Christmas reunion nearly 15 years after the last time they saw one another.","large":"Nearly 15 years after they were last together as a group, college friends Lance (Morris Chestnut), Harper (Taye Diggs), Candace (Regina Hall), Quentin (Terrence Howard), Robyn (Sanaa Lathan), Jordan (Nia Long), Murch (Harold Perrineau), and Mia (Monica Calhoun) finally reunite over the Christmas holidays. Though much has changed in their lives, the friends discover just how easy it is for long-forgotten rivalries and passionate romances to be reignited.

programme.title: Something New
programme.desc: A Black woman raises eyebrows among her friends when she develops a budding romance with a white man.","large":"Career-minded Kenya McQueen is set up on a blind date with architect Brian Kelly, but backs out when she realizes that he is white. Impressed with his work on a friend's mansion, McQueen hires Kelly to design her new garden -- and he sweeps her off her feet. But, after her friends introduce her to executive Mark Harper, McQueen must choose between the type of man she always dreamed she wanted and giving in to life's little surprises.

programme.title: Little
programme.desc: Jordan is a take-no-prisoners mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant and employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself.","large":"Jordan is a take-no-prisoners tech mogul who torments her long-suffering assistant, April, and the rest of her employees on a daily basis. She soon faces an unexpected threat to her personal life and career when she magically transforms into a 13-year-old version of herself right before a do-or-die presentation. Jordan will now need to rely on April more than ever -- if April is willing to stop treating Jordan like a 13-year-old child who has an attitude problem.

programme.title: 5 Flights Up
programme.desc: A husband (Morgan Freeman) and wife (Diane Keaton) spend a hectic weekend pondering the sale of the apartment they've shared for more than 40 years.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess serves as a special deputy to transport a man who's accused of killing his wife, the stagecoach is attacked by a group that's looking for the prisoner.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Aging but beautiful Lily Langford is touring the West, and she arrives in Laramie broke and one step ahead of bill collectors, thanks to her gambler husband.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Passengers of a stagecoach, forced to wait out a storm at the Sherman Ranch, all have something they are trying to hide.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: The new stage line superintendent wants Jess fired, which causes tension on the ranch; Slim and Jess track horse thieves.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A man interrupts a murder and robbery, and makes the most out of his moment of celebrity at Slim's expense.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess unwillingly works to help T.J. Patterson track a thief who stole money from the stage line, along with the heart of Patterson's daughter.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Five years after committing murder, Frank Buckley is paroled to Slim Sherman, but there are some in town who don't want the killer in their midst.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hunt for Vernon Kane, who has robbed the bank and killed a popular deputy, but their search also leads them to a gambler and his wife, who've joined forces with the outlaw.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess join a posse hunting for three escaped gang members who attempted to rob the Wells Fargo office, killing a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess become involved in a fight between the ranchers and the homesteaders, and despite their efforts at keeping the situation under control, a rancher is murdered.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Hoping to find a better price for their cattle, Slim and Jess wind up in Nebraska, where the death of the marshal leads the two to take his place for a month.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess, on the run after killing a marshal, is offered a place in Owen Cantrell's private army fighting in a border dispute between the U.S. and Canada.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim encounters a loudmouthed bully with a wagon train on the outskirts of town, and when the bully is killed, Slim is kidnapped to face charges of murder per the wagon train rules.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess and the marshal hunt a band of outlaws, but after gunfire is exchanged, the gang leader suggests a prisoner exchange -- he'll give back the local man he's taken in exchange for Jess and the marshal.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess goes to help an old prospector friend, he crosses Matt Jessup and his gang, who have the townsfolk too scared to talk.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A professor from the East asks Slim to guide him to his friend's gold strike from a decade earlier, but there is more to the professor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A woman looks to Slim for help when a gang of outlaws plans to kill her marshal husband as revenge for a robbery he averted.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While Jess is acting sheriff of Laramie, a notorious yet cowardly bounty hunter targets one of Jess' friends.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While delivering $10,000 to the stage office, Slim manages to stop one holdup attempt, but a second attempt is successful, leaving Slim to chase down the missing money and the robber.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bank robbery leads to the recovery of a high-strung horse from Slim's ranch, and prompts a disagreement between Slim and Andy.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While catching mustangs, Slim and Jess save a man's life, and Slim offers the man a spot at the ranch, to Jess' chagrin.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hope to sell horses to the stage line and collect the extra money offered, so Jess goes in search of horses to sell.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: In the 1870s Wyoming, Slim Sherman and his brother try to save the ranch after their father's death.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bounty hunter turned sheriff comes looking for Jess, who has a price on his head for the killing of Blake Wilkie.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Outlaws take over a town nearly emptied by a rumor of gold, leaving Slim outnumbered and unable to go for help.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Fran Ericson returns to Laramie looking for revenge on the stage company she blames for her father's ruin.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: The shooting of a neighbor's son on Sherman land refuels the feud between the Shermans and the Parkinsons, leading Ben Parkinson to kidnap Jess.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A Sioux attack and a stagecoach carrying gold -- plus five passengers -- both come to Laramie on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When he kills the sheriff chasing him, an outlaw switches identities with the dead man and tries to fool Slim and Jess.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: The so-called Robin Hood of the West saves Jess from a trio of Sioux warriors, then holds up the stage, robbing a banker and giving the cash to an elderly couple.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim finds the town turning against him when he presses charges after a neighbor kills Slim's new ranch hand.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An ex-con forces Jess to take him to Utah, where Jess had killed the con's brother -- and where that brother had hidden a large sum of cash.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When a cattleman who double-crossed Slim is later found dead, Slim becomes the prime suspect in the man's death.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A sick passenger arrives on the stage, looking for Jess, who wants nothing to do with the new arrival.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A wounded outlaw's brother kidnaps Slim and a vet and takes them to the gang's hideout to tend the injured man.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An injured marshal, transporting a prisoner to court to testify, is forced to seek help at the Sherman ranch, where they are surrounded by gang members who want to prevent the prisoner's testimony.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Slim is wounded and another man killed, Jess hunts the shooter, identifying the man by his horse.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's half-Cheyenne neighbor considers inviting some of his tribe to join him on the ranch he inherited from his father.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess frees a bounty hunter's prisoner who'd saved his life years earlier; having discharged his debt, he decides to look into the man's crime to see whether he should be left free or recaptured.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jesse comes upon a starving drifter who thinks Jess is going to shoot him; Jess and Slim offer the drifter a job.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is put to the test when he is asked by the Army to hunt down a thief who's stolen a payroll delivery -- but the thief is an old friend who once saved Jess' life.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim is taken as a substitute for a condemned man by a farmer who is desperate for the $100 bounty to be paid upon delivery.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess rides shotgun on a stage carrying an Army payroll, robbers take the cash and leave the passengers stranded in the desert.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An old outlaw, hoping to spend his last years in peace in Laramie, asks for Slim's help in clearing his name.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess gets a call for help from his old partner, Dixie Howard, who once saved Jess' life, but the man Jess once knew has changed.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: With an increase of Sioux attacks on the stage, Slim suggests repairing an old road as an alternate route.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim Sherman represents the stage line in a contract with an outlaw's widow, who is also a secret investigator.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess come to the aid of a family of entertainers whose wagon breaks down as they travel East; unbeknownst to all, the family is being followed by a group of men who think the family is transporting opium.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess are in dire need of a housekeeper, so the judge will allow them to keep Mike on the ranch.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Daisy takes Jess to the dentist in Cheyenne, Jess is deputized to transport a prisoner back to Laramie.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After his son is killed, Carl Sanford and his surviving sons decide to use the Sherman Ranch to exact their own brand of justice on the killer as he's being transported to prison.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is unwittingly riding shotgun on a payroll stage that has been rigged to wreck; after the robbery, Jess trails the bandits to Billings.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An ex-con from Slim's past shows up on the ranch, seeking assistance from Slim, who grudgingly agrees to help.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When a lame horse forces Jess to stop at the Tolliver holdings, he winds up a hostage of the Dyer gang.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While visiting Laramie, Daisy discovers a dead body on the floor down the hall from her hotel room, but she has trouble getting people to believe her when she identifies the killer.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess saves a crippled Blackfoot youth from a scalp hunter despite the Army edict that forbids settlers from helping a member of the Blackfoot tribe.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim finds himself caught between an Army colonel and the Sioux nation when the colonel tries to force his agenda after Wounded Knee.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess, acting as deputy while Mort is in Denver, must foil a murder plot against an ex-con, who is also seeking revenge.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's attempt to help an old friend goes awry when the man is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After threatening a rancher, Jess is framed when that rancher is murdered, and must join an outlaw gang while trying to clear his name.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Slim saves the life of a young Arapaho woman targeted by the Cady brothers, she insists that she belongs to Slim thenceforth.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When his horse is stolen while he's on the trail, Jess tracks the horse and the thief to a village, where he contacts the sheriff, but is stunned when the youth is given a death sentence for the crime.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Appointed by a cattleman's group to look into a spate of rustling, Slim finds himself tracking a man and a woman, who've been stealing cattle together for some time.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An illiterate youth finds himself caught between a pair of drifters who want him to join their life of crime, and Daisy, who hopes to rehabilitate the boy.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A man running from a posse returns to Laramie hoping to win back his wife and daughter, claiming he's reformed, though he is not what he seems.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A stolen horse leads Slim to a war between squatters and cattlemen in the high country.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess must find the man who stole his identity, his money, and ultimately left him for dead and facing a hanging if he survived.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While acting as sheriff, Slim tries to help a man and his wife who've run afoul of the Catlin brothers.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is riding shotgun on a stage shipping cash to Denver that has been targeted by a pair of outlaws armed with dynamite.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When both a stage and the relay station are attacked by Sioux braves, Slim and Jess must rescue Mike, Daisy and the single coach passenger.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A rancher's daughter goes in search of Slim, hoping to save her father from hanging, since Slim is her father's alibi.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Paul Halleck, who ran a Yankee prison camp in which Jess had been imprisoned years earlier, arrives in town to take the job of deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's old flame returns to Laramie to sing in her ex-con boyfriend's newly re-opened casino, but the boyfriend has plans for Slim.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess offers to help a neighbor whose ranch is threatened by a wildfire, but the neighbor instead asks him to pick up the man's mail-order bride.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim, Daisy and Mike try to help a girl rescue her mother from a well, unaware that the woman's husband is part of a stage robbery.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess and Mort search for the men who robbed the Laramie bank and shot Mike; after finding two, they learn the third man may be in Chlorine, so Jess heads out alone.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Slim's former commander is wounded while riding the stage, he makes a stop at the Sherman ranch to rest and size up the politicians who are urging him to run for president.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's girlfriend, feeling neglected, turns her attention to a charming gunslinger who's targeted her for extortion.

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. Shiv and Pooja share a happy marriage until she discovers his infidelity. When film star Raj enters her life, love, choices, and self-worth are tested unexpectedly by fate.

programme.title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
programme.desc: Starring: Shruti Haasan,Sonu Sood. Urbanite Ram falls for rural beauty Sona, nurtured by her brother Raghuveer. Ram faces a test to earn Raghuveer's approval after a family dispute.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Rashmika Mandanna. Pushpa and Bhanwar Singh's fierce rivalry reaches its peak in this explosive finale packed with action, emotion, and long-awaited confrontation.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (2020)
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Dhawan,Paresh Rawal. When a matchmaker is insulted by Rozario, a rich businessman, he vows to exact revenge. As a result, he makes a porter pretend to be a rich man and marries him off to Rozario's daughter.

programme.title: Shoorveer 2
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Sirish,Surbhi Srinivas. Jeeva and Joshna fall in love with each other and are happy in their relationship. Things get complicated when they learn that they are leading parallel lives with a couple living next door to Joshna.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Starring: Aamir Khan,Asin Thottumkal. After a brutal attack, Sanjay's memory resets every fifteen minutes. Armed with tattooed notes, he seeks his fiancee's killer, navigating a labyrinth of clues before time resets his investigation.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. A reformed criminal, Babu finds purpose in raising a train crash survivor as his own. But when his past resurfaces, his newfound happiness hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Baby John
programme.desc: Starring: Varun Dhawan,Keerthy Suresh. To protect his daughter, Satya Verma vanishes. But danger resurfaces, forcing him to confront Babbar Sher and the ghosts of a life he tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Kanguva
programme.desc: Starring: Suriya,Bobby Deol. Bounty hunter Francis learns he's the reincarnation of warrior Kanguva. As memories awaken, he must face revenge, redemption, and protect someone precious from his old enemies.

programme.title: Good Newwz
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Kareena Kapoor Khan. Two couples with the same surnames undergo in vitro fertilization, but things get complicated when they discover that their sperms have been mixed up.

programme.title: Adam Don
programme.desc: Starring: Prithviraj Sukumaran,Narain. Adam rushes back to Scotland after his family's murder and baby Ila's kidnapping. With heartbreak fueling him, he dives into a suspense-filled hunt for answers, justice, and his child.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Andaaz
programme.desc: Andaaz

programme.title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
programme.desc: Starring: Raghava Lawrence,Oviya. Raghava, a young man fearful of ghosts, enjoys a happy life with his family until a trip to Coimbatore results in his possession by a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Game Changer
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Charan,Kiara Advani. Ram Nandan, a bold official, confronts corrupt leaders and fights for electoral fairness, seeking to revolutionize the government's workings and uphold democracy.

programme.title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
programme.desc: Starring: Shruti Haasan,Sonu Sood. Urbanite Ram falls for rural beauty Sona, nurtured by her brother Raghuveer. Ram faces a test to earn Raghuveer's approval after a family dispute.

programme.title: Sky Force
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Veer Pahariya. Amid escalating airstrikes between India and Pakistan, a group strives to uncover the truth behind the conflict, risking their lives to stop deadly consequences.

programme.title: Sher Ka Shikaar
programme.desc: Starring: Mohanlal,Jagapathi Babu. Murugan saves Puliyoor from tiger attacks. Daddy, a drug lord, exploits him and falsely accuses him. Now, Murugan must clear his name and protect the village from human monsters.

programme.title: Bachchhan Paandey
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Kriti Sanon. To succeed, Myra focuses her film on notorious gangster Bachchhan Paandey. The plot thickens when Paandey demands to act in the film, creating chaos and raising stakes for everyone involved.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: Starring: Amitabh Bachchan,Amrita Singh. After a cruel betrayal, Azad, a king, is imprisoned by General Dyer. His son embarks on a quest to liberate him and restore peace to their kingdom.

programme.title: Extra Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Starring: Nithiin,Sreeleela. Abhinay, once lost in artistic struggle, discovers love that redefines his path. A sudden opportunity to act in a movie changes everything, pushing him toward fame and self-discovery.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Kareena Kapoor. Pawan, a Hanuman devotee, finds a speech-impaired Pakistani girl lost in Haryana and undertakes a dangerous journey across borders to reunite her with her family with love.

programme.title: Pighalta Aasman
programme.desc: Arti, a Delhi businesswoman, goes to Kashmir to claim land from Suraj Arora. She falls for him, while Anuradha loves Suraj, sparking rivalry and changes.

programme.title: Pardesi (1970)
programme.desc: A snake-charmer set to marry her father's assistant falls in love with an injured man who is being treated by her father.

programme.title: Garam Khoon
programme.desc: Garam Khoon

programme.title: Insaf Ki Pukar
programme.desc: Police Inspector Imaandaar, Dhani Lal, and Sohan Lal falsely accuse Jagannath, leading to his arrest. Years later, Jagannath's son Ajay seeks revenge for the injustice.

programme.title: Chitchor
programme.desc: Gauri has to choose between two suitors who come to her village.

programme.title: Nazrana
programme.desc: Nazrana

programme.title: Haathi Mere Saathi
programme.desc: Raju becomes very attached to his four elephants after they save his life. His wife, however, fears for her child and tells him that he must choose between the animals and his family.

programme.title: Karobaar : The Business Of Love
programme.desc: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

programme.title: Munna Baba(dub) (unakaga Ellam Unakka Tamil)
programme.desc: Sakthi, a rich spoilt brat falls for Indhu. His father, Vinu meets his friend Jayaganesh and they agree on a marriage proposal for their children. Sakthi wants to break the deal because he loves Indhu and wants to marry her, but he does not realise that Indhu is Jayaganesh's daughter. He tries to break the engagement by asking his cousins to misbehave and indulge in a fight. Ultimately in the end, the two get married.

programme.desc: Punjabi Movie Songs

programme.desc: Kaato Kaahto

programme.title: Chah Te Movie
programme.desc: Chah Te Movie

programme.title: Taxi No 9211
programme.desc: A taxi driver and a spoiled rich man's lives collide, changing both forever in one day.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Freaky Ali
programme.desc: A sports comedy film that tells the story of a poor man who discovers his natural talent for golf and decides to pursue a career in the sport. With the help of his friend and coach, he enters a tournament to compete against professional golfers and prove himself. The movie highlights themes of determination, hard work, and overcoming social barriers in an entertaining and uplifting plot.
